summary: Excellent! The test now passes. The fix was successful. The issue was in the `hashCode()` method of the `Product` class, which was using the `category` field instead of the `sku` field. This caused severe hash collisions, as all products in the same category would land in the same bucket. By changing the `hashCode()` method to use the `sku` field, the items are now distributed evenly across the buckets, resulting in a much better performance.
